latestHandover: Session 9 complete (2026-03-20). All 59 findings are now closed or formally deferred. Phase 9 infrastructure findings implemented: DR-57 (NoSchedule taints applied to all 3 control-plane nodes receptor-ctrl-10/11/50 via kubectl taint; longhorn.yaml + helmfile.yaml updated with tolerations for Longhorn DaemonSets and ARC controller), DR-58 (CSI sidecar resource limits cpu:200m/mem:256Mi; ARC controller cpu:500m/mem:512Mi), DR-59 (Prometheus retention 30d→15d; retentionSize 15GB already set). DR-51 (DinD injection) and DR-55 (Loki volume) were already resolved in the live cluster — no code change needed, tasks marked complete. DR-52 finding status reconciled from open to complete (task had completedAt but finding status was not updated). 0 open tasks. Audit is ready for /finalise-global-audit: receptor-infra audit/260319-cicd-workflow-health branch contains helmfile.yaml + values/longhorn.yaml + values/prometheus-stack.yaml changes. All other repos already had their branches raised in earlier sessions.

sessionHistory.summary: Phase 9 infrastructure implementation. DR-57: NoSchedule taints applied live to receptor-ctrl-10/11/50; Longhorn DaemonSets and ARC controller toleration added to helmfile. DR-58: CSI sidecar and ARC controller resource limits. DR-59: Prometheus retention 15d. DR-51/DR-55 determined to already be resolved in live cluster. DR-52 finding status reconciled. 0 open tasks remain.
Live k8s cluster performance audit. Added DR-52–DR-59 (8 new Infrastructure findings, Phase 9). No code changes this session — audit document update only.
Infrastructure recovery: Fixed MTU (1370) and NetworkPolicy egress for arc-runners. Fixed helmfile.yaml syntax. Restored receptor-infra runner set. Identified DinD injection blocker.
